untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) dynamic small-cap classification by market cap (not available in indicator list), (2) ranking securities by prior year returns within a universe (requires cross-sectional comparison not supported by single-security indicators), and (3) fixed calendar dates for entry/exit (specific dates not provided in source text). The indicator-based system cannot evaluate 'worst returns in prior year' relative to peer group or classify by market cap tier.
translation_notes: This is a cross-sectional, calendar-based factor strategy requiring portfolio construction and universe ranking logic beyond single-security technical indicators. Implementation requires: (a) market cap screening logic, (b) prior year return ranking across small-cap universe, (c) explicit calendar dates for rebalancing. Source text indicates seasonal/calendar effect but specific entry/exit dates are missing ('specific date not stated in excerpt').
